---
title: "Plots_RescueData"
author: "Ben Wasserman"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(viridis)
library(ggpubr)
library(colorspace)
library(grid)
library(gdata)
library(str2str)
library(parallel)
library(beepr)

```

```{r loaddata}

load("RescueData.Rdata")
```
